title: Berk Furniture
description:
Living like a viking with viking furniture and more to come
Future Plans

More Furniture
body:
Have you ever wanted to design your viking house with HTTYD furniture but you can't find any good mods for 1.18.2 and 1.20.1 well this mod have it and more to come so keep checking on the mod for more furniture

Future Plans
Weapon
Armours
More Furniture

To use the Strove pit you need flint and steel then right click on it with the flint and steel to lit it
